management_quotes.quote_text: NVIDIA is transitioning to a new reporting framework that better reflects its current and future growth drivers. NVIDIA will have two market platforms — Data Center and Edge Computing. Within Data Center, NVIDIA will report two sub-markets, Hyperscale and ACIE, which incorporates AI Clouds, Industrial and Enterprise.
management_quotes.speaker: Management
management_quotes.context_before: of Directors approved an additional $80.0 billion to the Company’s share repurchase authorization, without expiration. NVIDIA is increasing its quarterly cash dividend from $0.01 per share to $0.25 per share of common stock, which will be paid on June 26, 2026, to all shareholders of record on June 4, 2026.
management_quotes.context_after: Hyperscale will include revenue from the public clouds and the world’s largest consumer internet companies, while ACIE addresses NVIDIA’s growth opportunity in diverse AI purpose-built data centers and AI factories across industries and countries. Edge Computing highlights data processing devices for agentic and physical AI including PCs, game consoles, workstations,

management_quotes.quote_text: Beginning in the first quarter of fiscal 2027, NVIDIA's non-GAAP financial measures no longer exclude stock-based compensation expense. The historical non-GAAP financial information presented has been updated to include stock-based compensation expense.
management_quotes.speaker: Management
management_quotes.context_before: of previous periods, the company has shown a reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP financial measures. These reconciliations adjust the related GAAP financial measures to exclude acquisition-related and other costs, other, gains/losses from equity securities, net, certain other income and expense, and the associated tax impact of these items where applicable.
management_quotes.context_after: Free cash flow is calculated as GAAP net cash provided by operating activities less both purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets and principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets. NVIDIA believes the presentation of its non-GAAP financial measures enhances the users’ overall understanding of the

uncertainties.current_quote: Revenue is expected to be $91.0 billion, plus or minus 2%. NVIDIA is not assuming any Data Center compute revenue from China in its outlook.
uncertainties.prior_quote: Revenue is expected to be $78.0 billion, plus or minus 2%. NVIDIA is not assuming any Data Center compute revenue from China in its outlook.
uncertainties.explanation: Q2 FY2027 revenue guidance of $91.0B is materially above the prior Q1 FY2027 guidance of $78.0B, representing a ~17% sequential raise, signaling accelerating demand even while maintaining the China revenue exclusion.

uncertainties.current_quote: GAAP and non-GAAP operating expenses are expected to be approximately $8.5 billion and $8.3 billion, respectively.
uncertainties.prior_quote: GAAP and non-GAAP operating expenses are expected to be approximately $7.7 billion and $7.5 billion, respectively.
uncertainties.explanation: Q2 FY2027 opex guidance is approximately $800M higher than Q1 FY2027 guidance, reflecting accelerated investment to support growth but still below the revenue growth rate, suggesting continued operating leverage.

uncertainties.current_quote: For the full year fiscal 2027, NVIDIA expects GAAP and non-GAAP tax rates to be between 16.0% and 18.0%, excluding any discrete items and material changes to NVIDIA's tax environment.
uncertainties.prior_quote: For the full year fiscal 2027, GAAP and non-GAAP tax rates are expected to be between 17.0% and 19.0%, excluding any discrete items and material changes to NVIDIA's tax environment.
uncertainties.explanation: Full-year FY2027 tax rate guidance was lowered by 100 basis points at both ends of the range, representing a modest but meaningful improvement to net income expectations.

source_limitations.description: Only an earnings press release (SEC 8-K exhibit) was available. No earnings call transcript or Q&A session was acquired.
source_limitations.impact: Management tone and analyst question responses are absent.
